plan_binding_snapshot.title: CP00-573 RP18.P06.M06.S09-RP18.P07.M02.S02 generated_from_weighted_implementation_ledger
plan_binding_snapshot.renumbering_policy: Pack IDs are monotonic after the latest live closeout pack. If a requested locked queue skips live-open ledger units, live-open units are inserted first and requested packs are shifted with correction_reason.

implementation_summary.summary: CP00-573 implements descriptor-only coverage of the RP18 p06 closeout p07 foundation: the P06 Synthetic Fixture Set tail (the fourteen remaining rows), the full P06 Test And Golden Case Set, Hermes Evidence Packet, Claude Review Packet, and Closeout And Next Handoff cycles, the full P07 Scope Inventory and Contract Draft cycles, and the P07 Type And Shape Definition head (the first two rows) as eight descriptor-only sections over 150 planned rows with Hermes evidence (H18), Claude review packet (C18), and CP00-574 handoff, without opening AI legal workflows, precedent, clause markup, or DD extraction runtime or any other closed runtime surface.

parsed_review.summary: CP00-573 is a descriptor-only RP18 closeout pack (p06 closeout / p07 foundation, 150 units, risk C, range RP18.P06.M06.S09-RP18.P07.M02.S02). Independent read-only inspection confirms the pack-level readiness claim is honest and supported: manifest and command-evidence report production_ready=false, runtime_ready=false, status implemented_pending_review, with a descriptor_verified flag and descriptor-level production_ready_candidate=true reflecting only structural coverage validity. Coverage reconciles across baseline, manifest, contract, registry, service, validators, tests, and the validate script (deliverable/micro-phase/phase sums all = 150; all units RP18; upstream CP00-572 -> next CP00-574 -> RP18.P07.M02.S03). Descriptor-only and no-write/no-real-data boundaries are declared and enforced: every row carries descriptor_only=true/runtime_execution=false; the CP573 no-write attestation sets writes_product_state, DB row, object-storage, emits_hermes_runtime_receipt, and loads_real_fixture_data all false; source scan found no I/O sinks, secrets, URLs, or PII. Authority boundary holds: Claude tools limited to Read/Grep/Glob, claude_is_final_approval=false, promotes_claude_to_final_approval=false, claims_enterprise_trust_from_local_validation=false, human final approval required for runtime opening; validators and the contract script assert all of these and the contract's embedded descriptor projection deep-matches the code-generated descriptor. Hermes patterns appear only as deterministic evidence/receipt-shape descriptor strings, not product runtime. Review hardening is intact: forbidden_review_evidence enumerates failed_authentication_run, zero_byte_output, malformed_json_output, fenced_json_output, tool_call_shaped_output, and missing-field/approval/mutation/trust claims; the readiness auth-preflight passed with non-empty valid JSON (1436 bytes, exit 0). All recorded validation commands report exit_code 0. No P0/P1/P2 issues; one non-blocking P3 cosmetic note on the changed-file-scope report classifying the pack's own manifest directory as 'unrelated'. Verdict PASS_WITH_FINDINGS; does not block pack or goal closeout. Final human approval and enterprise-trust closure remain outside this read-only receipt.

findings.title: changed-file-scope labels the pack's own manifest dir under both implementation and 'unrelated_dirty_files_preserved'
findings.details: docs/closeout-packs/cp00-573/ and docs/closeout-pack-plan/new-session-handoff.md appear in both untracked_implementation_files (lines 152-153) and unrelated_dirty_files_preserved (lines 158-159). For the pack's own manifest/command-evidence directory (docs/closeout-packs/cp00-573/), the label 'unrelated' is a slight misnomer. There is no functional impact on review scope: the authoritative active_pack_implementation_refs list correctly contains only the eight tracked code/contract files, and active_untracked_implementation_files_omitted is empty, so no required implementation file was dropped and no unrelated dirty file was pulled into pack scope.
findings.recommendation: Optionally refine the scope-report generator so a pack's own manifest directory is not classified as 'unrelated_dirty_files_preserved'. No action required for CP00-573 closeout; informational only.

commit_policy.message: Close CP00-573 ai legal workflows core p06 closeout p07 foundation descriptor pack
